Appearances:
Plaintiff Royal Sycamore Management, LLC is present. Represented by Dipak Gandhi.
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant David Mcrae is present.
Attorney Carolyn Gold appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JUN-04-20 18 is vacated. (501)
